The Partygoer.NAME: The Partygoer
The Partygoer.DESCRIPTION: [b]Joker[/b] - Counts as any [i]number[/i] and any [i]color[/i].[br][b]On Spread[/b] - I have [b]+10 Points[/b] for each [i]other[/i] [b]Tile[/b] in the [b]Row[/b]

The Banker.NAME: The Banker
The Banker.DESCRIPTION: [b]Joker[/b] - Counts as any [i]number[/i] and any [i]color[/i].[br][b]On Spread[/b] - The next [b]Item[/b] or [b]Tile[/b] you buy in the [b]Shop[/b] is [b]Free[/b]

The Architect.NAME: The Architect
The Architect.DESCRIPTION: [b]Joker[/b] - Counts as any [i]number[/i] and any [i]color[/i].[br][b]On Spread[/b] - All your [b]Consumable Items[/b] gain [b]+1 Uses[/b].[br][b]While Spread[/b] - If I'm not a [b]Leech[/b], When you [b]Use[/b] a [b]Consumable[/b], [b]Gain +5 Points[/b]

The Vampire.NAME: The Vampire
The Vampire.DESCRIPTION: [b]Joker[/b] - Counts as any [i]number[/i] and any [i]color[/i].[br][b]On Spread[/b] - If I am a [b]Leech[/b], I [b]Gain Points[/b] equal to the ammount of [b]Spread Points[/b] in the [b]Row[/b] I'm [b]Leeching[/b]
